title: Own-job MPI communication fraction
difficulty_justification: Two chained calls are required: slurm.job_details to confirm the job belongs to the requester, then telemetry.query_timeseries on the job's nodes to recover the per-step MPI-time series and compute the wall-time fraction.
query_text: My MPI run, job 904512, felt slow. Out of its total wall time, what fraction was spent inside MPI communication versus actual compute? Use whatever profiling counters the cluster keeps for my own jobs.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: MPI communication consumed about 0.43 (43%) of wall time in job 904512: 412 s of MPI_Wait/MPI_Allreduce out of 958 s elapsed across its 8 nodes.

checkpoints.description: slurm.job_details confirms job 904512 belongs to the requester before any telemetry pull.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains slurm.job_details(job_id=904512) and observation.user matches requester

checkpoints.description: telemetry.query_timeseries pulls MPI-time metrics scoped to job 904512's allocated nodes.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains telemetry.query_timeseries with node_id in job's nodes set and metric_name implying mpi/comm time

checkpoints.description: Agent reports an MPI fraction within 5% of 0.43.
